A propitiatory ceremony should be performed in the holy house
for the horses for seven days with the Vedic hymns addressed to the

Lustration Ceremony XLIV 363
Sun-God, Varuna, Vi^vedevas, Brahman, Indra and Visnu.
[Cf. ^rm—

The horses that have been worshipped thus ought not to be
addressed harshly or beaten. On the other hand, their fears and
misgivings ought to be dispelled through the holy sounds of the
Punyaha hymns, conchs, musical instruments and songs.

When the 8th day dawns, a hermitage covered with the holy
grass and tree barks should be constructed to the south of the arch
